payload:
SCALE: micro only. Local machine only (Apple Silicon Mac). Use MLX for GPU work, numpy/scipy for math. Do NOT ssh to RunPod. Read PROMPT.md for how to pick work. Read 
  HYPOTHESES.yml, pick the lowest-priority open node with scale=micro and satisfied deps, run the full cycle, emit experiment.done. After integration, pick next eligible micro node. If none
   remain, generate 2-3 new micro hypotheses. The loop never ends.

exp_compressed_expert_sweep KILLED. LoRA-XS: subspace collapse (cos~0.10, 218x worse than LoRA, d-independent). VeRA: intermediate (cos~1/sqrt(d), signal retention <1%). Shared bases destroy geometric diversity needed for SOLE orthogonality. Correct storage path: INT4/INT8 quantization of standard LoRA (4-8x compression, preserves subspace independence).

exp_attention_as_domain_similarity KILLED. Attention cosine does NOT predict domain similarity (rho=0.073, p=0.66). FFN cosine stronger (rho=0.185). Macro finding likely converged-training artifact, not structural.

exp_fewshot_adaptation_recovery KILLED. K1: 50 steps only 35% gap reduction (need >50%). K2: 0.7% forgetting on original base. Logarithmic adaptation dynamics = fundamental limit. SVD warm-start promising (103% recovery at 100 steps).

3 consecutive kills: compressed_expert_sweep, attention_as_domain_similarity, fewshot_adaptation_recovery. Consider: (1) hypothesis quality may be declining, (2) micro-scale synthetics may be hitting fundamental limits, (3) remaining P3 nodes may be better candidates. Next eligible P3 micro: exp_inference_routing_strategies, exp_lte_parallel_base_construction.

Both exp_attention_as_domain_similarity and exp_fewshot_adaptation_recovery adversarial-reviewed and confirmed KILLED. Attention cosine rho=0.073 (need 0.3), fewshot 35% gap reduction (need 50%). 3 consecutive kills active. Exhaustion warning: consider P3 nodes exp_inference_routing_strategies or exp_lte_parallel_base_construction next.
exp_reasoning_expert_distillation: 3 GPU tasks queued (train_reasoning_expert, eval_math500, eval_composition_interference). Queue: 1 active + 12 pending.

exp_inference_routing_strategies: KILLED (K3). All strategies <5us latency (K1/K2 pass), but best quality capture 41.5% (K3 kill <90%). Pre-merge confirmed as SOLE default. Routing latency is solved; quality selection is mathematically bounded. | exp_lte_parallel_base_construction: PROVEN. Parallel LoRA merging (LTE) produces equivalent composition substrate to sequential (ReLoRA). K1=0.979, K2=0.73x, K3=0.455. Engineering choice only (multi-GPU vs single-GPU). Both experiments ran in parallel, 2 PAPER.md files written.

Integrated 2 macro results: exp_cat_weight_convergence PROVEN (CAT weights ~1.0, unit-weight validated), exp_attention_layer_orthogonality PROVEN (K1=0%, K2=0.0 for dissimilar domains at d=3584). GPU queue: 1 active + 12 pending. Next: check remaining results as they complete.

exp_lte_parallel_base_construction: PROCEED (adversarial review passed). Integrated: proven status, 2 new hypotheses (lte_no_reset_macro, lte_rank_accumulation_quality), VISION.md/FINDINGS.md updated. Also: exp_inference_routing_strategies KILL confirmed (K3: 41.5% quality capture). consecutive_kills reset to 0. exp_reasoning_expert_distillation submitted (3 GPU tasks queued, acknowledged).
exp_lte_no_reset_macro queued as run_lte_no_reset_1773513906. GPT-2 125M d=768 reset-vs-no-reset + 4 expert composition. Queue now has 13 pending tasks.

exp_lte_rank_accumulation_quality: KILLED. Parallel rank accumulation shows no quality advantage over sequential at d=256 (base loss ratio 1.023, cos ratio 2.06 CI includes 1.0, expert loss ratio 1.007). K1 triggered: <1% quality difference. 1/K dilution and shard homogeneity negate rank capacity advantage. Bonus: LoRA-merge advantage over conventional grows with d (2% at d=64 to 33-35% at d=256). Dir: micro/models/lte_rank_accumulation_quality/

exp_lte_rank_accumulation_quality: KILLED confirmed by adversarial review. Parallel rank accumulation no advantage over sequential at d=256. 1/K dilution + data homogeneity cancel rank advantage. Bonus LoRA-merge vs conventional claim flagged (untuned LR confound). consecutive_kills=1.
Fixed rsync --delete destroying RunPod adapters. Submitted retrain_all_adapters to GPU queue. 14 pending tasks, all p3 macro nodes queued.
Killed stuck run_all_eval (3.6h hung). Reordered 14-task queue: training first, retrain mid, adapter-dependent last. No new scripts this iteration — next: check results, write P4 experiment scripts.
scripted exp_automated_correction_pipeline (P4 macro), submitted run_correction_pipeline_1773515640 to GPU queue position 15. 3 remaining unscripted P4+ nodes blocked by deps.

exp_minimax_grassmannian_packing KILLED (K1): AP already minimax-optimal (max/mean=1.00x equidistributed). d=256 tail anomaly is B-matrix training dynamics, not skeleton geometry. Stochastic refinement 0% acceptance rate — AP is robust local min for max-coherence. Implication: composition safety must target B-matrix overlap during training, not skeleton init.

exp_minimax_grassmannian_packing KILLED (K1). AP already minimax-optimal (equidistributed max/mean=1.00x). d=256 tail is B-matrix training dynamics. Adversarial review: PROCEED (kill valid). consecutive_kills=2.

scripted exp_full_base_free_pipeline, submitted run_full_base_free_1773517079 (pos 16). No new results to integrate — all recent completions failed (adapter-dependent, awaiting retrain). Queue: 16 pending, 1 active.

exp_procrustes_expert_transfer KILLED (K2). Alignment error 26-81% (threshold 5%). K1 survived: transferred PPL only 13.3% worse (threshold 20%). Activation Procrustes best but independent d=64 models too different. Cross-model transfer needs permutation matching (Git Re-Basin). consecutive_kills=3.
consecutive_kills=3, last 3 killed: minimax_grassmannian_packing, procrustes_expert_transfer, and prior. Pivot to higher-confidence micro hypotheses.

exp_procrustes_expert_transfer KILLED (K2). Alignment error 26-81% (threshold 5%). K1 survived (13.3% gap, threshold 20%). Activation Procrustes adds consistent 1.7% over naive but alignment error too high for independent models at d=64. Path forward: same-lineage transfer (proven) or Git Re-Basin at macro. consecutive_kills=3.

Scripted+submitted 2 P3 macro experiments: pilot50_composition_quality (run_composition_quality_1773517791) and converged_adapter_orthogonality (measure_orthogonality_1773517906). Queue: 18 pending, 1 active. Next: check queue progress, integrate results.
Scripted and submitted exp_reasoning_domain_composition (P2). Queue: 19 pending, 1 active. Next: check results, script exp_cross_domain_semantic_transfer (P3).
exp_composable_merge_pipeline scripted and submitted as run_composable_merge_1773518793. All scriptable macro nodes now queued (20 pending). Remaining open nodes blocked by in-flight experiments.

All 11 macro nodes active/queued. Queue: 1 active (run_all_eval ~1hr), 20 pending. No results to integrate yet. exp_distillation_quality_vs_teacher activated. Next: integrate results when tasks complete.

3 new macro hypotheses added: answer_conditioned_shadow_scoring (P3, eligible), b_matrix_regularization (P4, eligible), expert_pruning (P4, blocked). Queue: 20 pending, 1 active (run_all_eval). Killed orphaned eval_humaneval. Next: script exp_answer_conditioned_shadow_scoring.

Scripted and submitted 2 new macro experiments: exp_answer_conditioned_shadow_scoring (P3, queue pos 21) and exp_b_matrix_interference_regularization (P4, queue pos 22). HYPOTHESES.yml updated to active. All scriptable macro nodes now queued (22 pending, 1 active). Remaining open nodes blocked by in-flight experiments.

Queue healthy: run_all_eval active (101% CPU, ~2.5h into MMLU eval of 23 adapters). 22 pending. All scriptable macro nodes queued. 4 open macro nodes blocked by in-queue deps. No results to integrate yet. Will check again next iteration.

exp_amplification_factor_scaling SURVIVES. Amplification factor c grows sub-linearly with d (alpha=0.21, R2=0.975). c values: 1.42 (d=64), 1.58 (d=128), 1.90 (d=256). Net expert quality loss DECREASES with scale: 4.2% -> 1.2% -> 0.4%. Zero-shot transfer gets better at macro scale. Breaks 3-kill streak.
